title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF CONCEPCION, PROVINCE OF IL0COS SUR, TO GREGORIO DEL PILAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 156 / 51 OG No. 6, 2812 (June, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1246, June 10, 1955 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF CONCEPCION, PROVINCE OF IL0COS SUR, TO GREGORIO DEL PILAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Concepcion, Province of Ilocos Sur, is hereby changed to Gregorio del Pilar.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 10, 1955.
